# Hurricane Client

> Hurricane is a custom Java desktop **game client** for *Haven & Hearth* ("hafen"), forked from
> Loftar/Seatribe's open-source "Vanilla" `hafen-client` and maintained by Nightdawg (version
> `v1.63b`). It adds a large custom automation layer (`haven.automated.*`), quality-of-life UI, and
> opt-in integrations. This file is an AI-oriented index (see https://llmstxt.org). All paths are
> relative to the repository root.

Key facts for an assistant: build with **Apache Ant** (`build.xml`) â€” not Maven/Gradle; Java
**17â€“21** (source level 15); entry point is **`haven.Client`** (`src/haven/Client.java`); there is
**no unit-test suite** (validate with `ant jar`). The codebase is a fork that periodically merges the
`LoftarSeatribe` upstream, so core edits should be **surgical and additive**. Game logic also lives
in **resources** (`haven.res.*`, `@FromResource`), not only in `src/`.

## Start here

- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): Canonical agent instructions â€” build/run commands and the non-negotiable rules.
- [AI knowledge vault (Home)](ai-docs/Home.md): Map of Content linking every architecture & subsystem note.
- [Project Overview](ai-docs/Project-Overview.md): What Hurricane is, fork lineage, 30-second mental model.
- [Build and Run](ai-docs/guides/Build-and-Run.md): Ant targets, runtime flags, resource-code CLI.
- [Common Tasks & FAQ](ai-docs/guides/Common-Tasks-and-FAQ.md): Copy-pasteable recipes and "how do Iâ€¦" answers.

## Architecture

- [Architecture Overview](ai-docs/architecture/Architecture-Overview.md): Layers, threads, data/control flow (Mermaid).
- [Startup and Lifecycle](ai-docs/architecture/Startup-and-Lifecycle.md): `main()` â†’ threads â†’ login â†’ in-game.
- [Networking and Protocol](ai-docs/architecture/Networking-and-Protocol.md): Session/Connection, `MSG_*` message types, reliability.
- [Game State Model](ai-docs/architecture/Game-State-Model.md): `Glob`, `OCache`, `Gob`/`GAttrib`, `MCache`.
- [UI and Widget System](ai-docs/architecture/UI-and-Widget-System.md): The `Widget` tree and the `wdgmsg`/`uimsg` protocol.
- [Rendering Pipeline](ai-docs/architecture/Rendering-Pipeline.md): `haven.render`, GL/JOGL/LWJGL backends, shaders.
- [Resource System](ai-docs/architecture/Resource-System.md): `.res` files, `haven.res.*`, `FromResource`, lazy `Loading`.

## Subsystems (Hurricane custom)

- [Automation Bots](ai-docs/subsystems/Automation-Bots.md): The `haven.automated` package â€” bot pattern, triggering, `AUtils`, full catalog.
- [Pathfinding](ai-docs/subsystems/Pathfinding.md): A* navigation engine.
- [Combat System](ai-docs/subsystems/Combat-System.md): Fight UI + aggro/targeting scripts.
- [Mapper and MappingClient](ai-docs/subsystems/Mapper-and-MappingClient.md): Opt-in web-map grid upload.
- [Cookbook Integration](ai-docs/subsystems/Cookbook-Integration.md): Opt-in food-stats service.

## Reference

- [Package Map](ai-docs/reference/Package-Map.md): Every package and what lives in it.
- [Key Classes](ai-docs/reference/Key-Classes.md): The ~40 classes you'll touch most, with line counts.
- [Class Index (generated)](ai-docs/reference/Class-Index.md): All ~840 types â†’ package, kind, supertypes, lines.
- [Glossary](ai-docs/reference/Glossary.md): Domain & codebase vocabulary.
- [Coding Conventions](ai-docs/guides/Coding-Conventions.md): Patterns you MUST follow (threading, `Loading`, `wdgmsg`).
- [Adding a New Bot](ai-docs/guides/Adding-a-New-Bot.md): Step-by-step recipe.

## Tools

- [RAG retrieval tool](rag/README.md): `java rag/HurricaneRAG.java query "..."` â€” local TF-IDF retrieval over these docs.
- [Code map generator](rag/CodeMap.java): `java rag/CodeMap.java` â€” emits `rag/code-map.jsonl` (full API) + Class-Index.md.

## Optional

- [llms-full.txt](llms-full.txt): The entire knowledge base concatenated into one file (generate with `java rag/HurricaneRAG.java bundle`).
- [README.md](README.md): End-user readme (install, launch, links).
- [doc/resource-code](doc/resource-code): How resource-bundled Java code works (`get-code` / `find-updates`).
